series_metadata.series_description: Account created when a customer does not have the funds to pay the toll. This record series includes invoices, transactions, and payment for unpaid tolls.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 6 months after issuance and audited ; Electronic: Retain for 5 years and purged 5 years after account is closed. Records shall not be archived., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
